title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Local Government Unit of Los Baños with the University of the Philippines Los Baños (UPLB) for the Provision of Gasoline Support Amounting to One Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 100,000.00) Yearly for the Municipal Government of Los Baños and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 03/01/2021)
